MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Georgette Brown.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gregory Shashurin is present.
Attorney Robert M. Peterson representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Amanda L. Ebey, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of JAN-03-2012 is vacated.
